title: generic adam
wikitext:
[]: generic adam             Quote Post by gydromon » Sun May 06, 2007 10:07 am i just wanted to share with you guys who stopped by my shonen jump june 2007 issue- it's an ad for gen con and if you look in the back row on the top left, behind a balloon- a very generic adam is hanging out- who's on the balloon? an equally generic mooninite? (and if so, why is he there?)

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun May 06, 2007 10:10 am Lilith is not amused.
